column1: Per-gene circadian clock |λ| values — WT Astrocyte vs WT Microglia vs APP Astrocyte vs Aged Astrocyte (GSE261698)
All values: AR(2) eigenvalue modulus computed on log2(CPM+1) normalised time-series
WT Astrocyte: N=12 time points (ZT0–ZT22 every 2h); n=14025 genes; genome median=0.533
WT Microglia: N=12 time points (ZT0–ZT22 every 2h); n=17078 genes; genome median=0.521
APP Astrocyte: N=12 time points (ZT0–ZT22 every 2h); n=14383 genes; genome median=0.514
Aged Astrocyte: N=6 time points (ZT2/6/10/14/18/22); biological replicates averaged; n=30556 genes; genome median=0.549
NOTE: Aged Astrocyte uses only 6 time points — AR(2) estimates have higher uncertainty (~±0.15) than 12-point series (~±0.05).
NOTE: APP Microglia and Aged Microglia data files not available; analysis pending GEO download.
Dataset: GSE261698 Sheehan/Musiek et al. Nat Neurosci 2025. PMID 38853870.
COLLAPSE defined as Delta < -0.15; GAIN defined as Delta > +0.10; STABLE defined as |Delta| <= 0.10.
Aged Astrocyte estimates are indicative only due to N=6 time points — see manuscript Section 4.4.
